guideContainer.name: guide1
guideContainer.thankYouMessage: Thank you for submitting the form.

fd:scripts.fd:init: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.firstName"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".firstname input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n let field = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"firstname\\");\\n if (/[^a-zA-Z ]/.test(value)) {\\n\\n field.valid = false;\\n field.errorMessage = \\"Only alphabets and spaces are allowed\\";\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n field.valid = true;\\n }\\n\\n});"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".lastname input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.lastName"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".mobileNumber input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/\\\\D/g\, '');\\n\\n value = value.substring(0\, 10);\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.mobileNumber"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".addressLine1 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length >= 30) {\\n $(\\".addressLine2 input\\").focus();\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.addressLine1"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".addressLine2 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length >= 30) {\\n $(\\".addressLine3 input\\").focus();\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.addressLine2"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".addressLine3 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length > 30) {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"Address cannot exceed 90 characters.\\");\\n this.reportValidity();\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"\\");\\n\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.addressLine3"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

fd:scripts.fd:valueCommit: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.pincode"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"var pincode = this.value;\\n\\nif (pincode && pincode.length === 6) {\\n\\n fetch(\\"/content/pincode?pincode=\\" + pincode)\\n .then(function(response) {\\n return response.json();\\n })\\n .then(function(data) {\\n\\n console.log(data);\\n\\n if (data.success) {\\n\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"city\\").value = data.city;\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"state\\").value = data.state;\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"city\\").value = \\"\\";\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"state\\").value = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n })\\n .catch(function(error) {\\n console.log(error);\\n });\\n}"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false},{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".pincode input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let pincode = this.value;\\n\\n if (pincode.length !== 6) return;\\n\\n fetch(\\"https://api.jsonbin.io/v3/qs/6a1eb21fda38895dfe7af709\\")\\n .then(res => res.json())\\n .then(data => {\\n\\n let records = data.record || [];\\n\\n let match = records.find(item => item.pincode === pincode);\\n\\n let cityNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"city\\");\\n let stateNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"state\\");\\n\\n if (match) {\\n\\n \\n if (cityNode) cityNode.value = match.city;\\n if (stateNode) stateNode.value = match.state;\\n\\n \\n if (cityNode) cityNode.enabled = false;\\n if (stateNode) stateNode.enabled = false;\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let cityInput = document.querySelector(\\".city input\\");\\n let stateInput = document.querySelector(\\".state input\\");\\n\\n if (cityInput) {\\n cityInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n cityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (stateInput) {\\n stateInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n stateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n if (cityNode) {\\n cityNode.value = \\"\\";\\n cityNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n if (stateNode) {\\n stateNode.value = \\"\\";\\n stateNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let cityInput = document.querySelector(\\".city input\\");\\n let stateInput = document.querySelector(\\".state input\\");\\n\\n if (cityInput) {\\n cityInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n cityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (stateInput) {\\n stateInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n stateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n }\\n\\n });\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.pincode"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

fd:rules.fd:calc: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"CALC_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"VALUE_FIELD"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.greeting"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"greeting"}}\,{"nodeName":"to"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Hi "}}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"PLUS"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails.firstName"\,"displayName":"First Name"\,"type":"STRING"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Personal Details/First Name/"\,"name":"firstName"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.personalDetails"}}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"When"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"CONDITIONORALWAYS"\,"choice":null}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nguidelib.util.GuideUtil._addValues(\\"Hi \\"\, firstName.value ) ;\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Calculate"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

fd:scripts.fd:valueCommit: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.englishMarks"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"try {\\n\\n var english = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"englishMarks\\").value;\\n\\n alert(\\"English = \\" + english);\\n\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"grandTotal\\").value = english;\\n\\n alert(\\"Grand Total Updated\\");\\n\\n} catch(e) {\\n\\n alert(\\"Error = \\" + e);\\n\\n}"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

[{"script":{"content":"var english = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"englishMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar maths = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"mathsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar physics = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"physicsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar chemistry = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"chemistryMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar biology = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"biologyMarks\\").value) || 0;\\n\\nvar total = english + maths + physics + chemistry + biology;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"grandTotal\\").value = total;\\n\\nvar percentage = (total / 500) * 100;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"percentage\\").value =\\n percentage.toFixed(2);\\n\\nif (percentage >= 70) {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Eligible\\";\\n} else {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Not Eligible\\";\\n}"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.mathsMarks"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

[{"script":{"content":"var english = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"englishMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar maths = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"mathsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar physics = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"physicsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar chemistry = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"chemistryMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar biology = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"biologyMarks\\").value) || 0;\\n\\nvar total = english + maths + physics + chemistry + biology;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"grandTotal\\").value = total;\\n\\nvar percentage = (total / 500) * 100;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"percentage\\").value =\\n percentage.toFixed(2);\\n\\nif (percentage >= 70) {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Eligible\\";\\n} else {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Not Eligible\\";\\n}"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.physicsmarks"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

[{"script":{"content":"var english = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"englishMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar maths = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"mathsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar physics = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"physicsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar chemistry = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"chemistryMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar biology = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"biologyMarks\\").value) || 0;\\n\\nvar total = english + maths + physics + chemistry + biology;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"grandTotal\\").value = total;\\n\\nvar percentage = (total / 500) * 100;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"percentage\\").value =\\n percentage.toFixed(2);\\n\\nif (percentage >= 70) {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Eligible\\";\\n} else {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Not Eligible\\";\\n}"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.chemistryMarks"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

[{"script":{"content":"var english = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"englishMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar maths = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"mathsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar physics = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"physicsMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar chemistry = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"chemistryMarks\\").value) || 0;\\nvar biology = Number(guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"biologyMarks\\").value) || 0;\\n\\nvar total = english + maths + physics + chemistry + biology;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"grandTotal\\").value = total;\\n\\nvar percentage = (total / 500) * 100;\\n\\nguideBridge.resolveNode(\\"percentage\\").value =\\n percentage.toFixed(2);\\n\\nif (percentage >= 70) {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Eligible\\";\\n} else {\\n guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"eligibility\\").value =\\n \\"Not Eligible\\";\\n}"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.biologyMarks"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

[{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"CALC_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"VALUE_FIELD"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.grandTotal"\,"type":"NUMBER"\,"name":"grandTotal"}}\,{"nodeName":"to"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.englishMarks"\,"displayName":"Marks 100)/"\,"name":"physicsmarks"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails"}}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"PLUS"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.chemistryMarks"\,"displayName":"Marks 100)/"\,"name":"biologyMarks"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails"}}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"When"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"CONDITIONORALWAYS"\,"choice":null}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n physicsmarks.value ) \, chemistryMarks.value ) \, biologyMarks.value ) ;\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Calculate"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

[{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"CALC_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"VALUE_FIELD"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.percentage"\,"type":"NUMBER"\,"name":"percentage"}}\,{"nodeName":"to"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.grandTotal"\,"displayName":"Grand Total"\,"type":"NUMBER"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Academic Details/Result Section/Grand Total/"\,"name":"grandTotal"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection"}}}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"DIVIDE"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"NUMERIC_LITERAL"\,"value":"500"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"MULTIPLY"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"NUMERIC_LITERAL"\,"value":"100"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"When"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"CONDITIONORALWAYS"\,"choice":null}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\n ( ( grandTotal.value / 500 ) * 100 ) ;\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Calculate"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

[{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"CALC_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"VALUE_FIELD"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.eligibility"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"eligibility"}}\,{"nodeName":"to"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Eligible"}}\,{"nodeName":"When"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"CONDITIONORALWAYS"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPARISON_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.percentage"\,"displayName":"Percentage"\,"type":"NUMBER"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Academic Details/Result {\\n\\"Eligible\\";\\n\\n}\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Calculate"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""},{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"CALC_EXPRESSION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"VALUE_FIELD"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection.eligibility"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"eligibility"}}\,{"nodeName":"to"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Not Section/Percentage/"\,"name":"percentage"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.academicDetails.resultSection"}}}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"LESS_THAN"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"NUMERIC_LITERAL"\,"value":"71"}}]}}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif (percentage.value < 71) {\\n\\"Not Eligible\\";\\n\\n}\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Calculate"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

fd:scripts.fd:init:
[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"change\\"\, \\".club select\\"\, function () {\\n\\n $(\\".activities\\").empty(); // clear old checkboxes before AJAX\\n\\n var club = $(this).val();\\n\\n $.ajax({\\n url: \\"/content/club.json\\"\,\\n type: \\"GET\\"\,\\n data: { club: club }\,\\n success: function (response) {\\n\\n var activities = response.activities || [];\\n var container = $(\\".activities\\");\\n\\n container.empty();\\n\\n activities.forEach(function (item\, index) {\\n\\n container.append(\\n '
' +\\n '' +\\n '' +\\n '
'\\n );\\n\\n });\\n\\n }\\n });\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.clubDetails.club"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true},{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"change\\"\, \\".club select\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let club = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (!club) return;\\n\\n fetch(\\"/bin/club?club=\\" + encodeURIComponent(club))\\n .then(response => response.json())\\n .then(data => {\\n\\n console.log(\\"CF RESPONSE:\\"\, data);\\n\\n let container = document.querySelector(\\".activities-container\\");\\n\\n if (!container) {\\n console.log(\\"activities-container not found\\");\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n container.innerHTML = \\"\\";\\n\\n let activities = data.activities;\\n\\n if (!activities || activities.length === 0) {\\n container.innerHTML = \\"

No activities found

\\";\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n activities.forEach((activity\, index) => {\\n\\n let id = \\"activity_\\" + index;\\n\\n let checkboxHTML = `\\n
\\n \\n \\n
\\n `;\\n\\n container.innerHTML += checkboxHTML;\\n });\\n\\n })\\n .catch(error => {\\n console.log(\\"Error fetching CF data:\\"\, error);\\n\\n let container = document.querySelector(\\".activities-container\\");\\n if (container) {\\n container.innerHTML = \\"

Error loading activities

\\";\\n }\\n });\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.clubDetails.club"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

fd:scripts.fd:valueCommit: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.clubDetails.activities"\,"event":"Value Commit"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"$(document).on(\\"change\\"\, \\".club select\\"\, function () {\\n\\n var club = $(this).val();\\n\\n $.ajax({\\n url: \\"/content/clubLookup.json\\"\,\\n type: \\"GET\\"\,\\n data: {\\n club: club\\n }\,\\n success: function(response) {\\n\\n console.log(\\"Activities:\\"\, response.activities);\\n\\n }\,\\n error: function(error) {\\n console.log(error);\\n }\\n });\\n});"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

fd:rules.fd:click: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.login.generateOtp"\,"type":"BUTTON|AFCOMPONENT"\,"name":"generateOtp"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is clicked"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"FUNCTION_CALL"\,"functionName":{"id":"generateOTP"\,"displayName":"generateOTP"\,"type":"STRING|NUMBER|BOOLEAN|DATE|OPTIONS"\,"isDuplicate":false\,"displayPath":""\,"args":[]\,"impl":"$0()"}\,"params":[]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":false\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\ngenerateOTP();\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Click"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

fd:scripts.fd:click: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.login.generateOtp"\,"event":"Click"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"\\n\\nfetch('/libs/granite/csrf/token.json')\\n.then(res => res.json())\\n.then(data => {\\n\\n var email = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"guide[0].guide1[0].guideRootPanel[0].login[0].email[0]\\").value;;\\n\\n fetch('/bin/sendotp'\, {\\n method: 'POST'\,\\n headers: {\\n 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'\,\\n 'CSRF-Token': data.token\\n }\,\\n body: 'email=' + encodeURIComponent(email)\\n })\\n .then(res => res.json())\\n .then(result => {\\n alert(result.message);\\n });\\n\\n});"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true},{"script":{"content":"alert(\\"Button Clicked\\");"\,"event":"Click"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.login.generateOtp"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

fd:rules.fd:click: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.login.verifyOtp"\,"type":"BUTTON|AFCOMPONENT"\,"name":"verifyOtp"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is clicked"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"FUNCTION_CALL"\,"functionName":{"id":"verifyOTP"\,"displayName":"verifyOTP"\,"type":"STRING|NUMBER|BOOLEAN|DATE|OPTIONS"\,"isDuplicate":false\,"displayPath":""\,"args":[]\,"impl":"$0()"}\,"params":[]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":false\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nverifyOTP();\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Click"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

fd:scripts.fd:click: [{"script":{"content":"\\n\\nfetch('/libs/granite/csrf/token.json')\\n.then(res => res.json())\\n.then(data => {\\n \\n var otp = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"guide[0].guide1[0].guideRootPanel[0].login[0].otp[0]\\").value;\\n\\n fetch('/bin/verifyotp'\, {\\n method: 'POST'\,\\n headers: {\\n 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'\,\\n 'CSRF-Token': data.token\\n }\,\\n body: 'otp=' + encodeURIComponent(otp)\\n })\\n .then(res => res.json())\\n .then(result => {\\n\\n if(result.status === \\"success\\"){\\n alert(\\"OTP Verified\\");\\n } else {\\n alert(\\"Invalid OTP\\");\\n }\\n\\n });\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Click"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.login.verifyOtp"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

fd:rules.fd:click: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"XX"\,"type":"BUTTON"\,"name":"XX"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is clicked"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SUBMIT_FORM"\,"items":[]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nguideBridge.submit();\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Click"}]
